data.title: Rexel’s U.S. and digital growth lift Q3 results
data.description: The electrical and industrial supplier said more customers are using online tools for ordering, pricing, and delivery.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: How shoppers will use AI this holiday season
data.description: New Deloitte survey data and new AI features shared by retailers at Salesforce's Dreamforce conference preview holiday use cases.

data.title: Visa and Mastercard both launch new agentic AI payments tools
data.description: Both Visa and Mastercard's moves follow other launches in artificial intelligence (AI) payments from OpenAI and Google.

data.title: Salsify launches AI tools to automate product data management
data.description: A core part of the release is Angie; a conversational assistant built into Salsify’s platform. It allows users to perform complex configuration tasks and generate formulas through natural language prompts, reducing time spent on data preparation.

data.title: Canadian Tire reports data breach affecting ecommerce customers
data.description: The breach, identified on Oct. 2, involved a database containing names, addresses, email addresses and years of birth for online account holders of Canadian Tire, SportChek, Mark’s/L’Équipeur and Party City.
